title: Crystallization of SARS-CoV-2 nsp15 NendoU
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9rjvo","text":"Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) is the causative agent of coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19). The NSP15 endoribonuclease enzyme, known as NendoU, is highly conserved and plays a critical role in the ability of the virus to evade the immune system. NendoU is a promising target for the development of new antiviral drugs. This protocol was used to grow SARS CoV-2 NSP15 crystals that were applied high-throughput crystallographic fragment screening at XChem.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Protein and buffer requirements: 86.4 µL 3.4 mg/mL Sample 2.88 mL, Crystallization screen 2.88 µL Sample seeds, no dilution

Dispense 30 µL, Crystallisation screen into SwissCI 3 lens plate reservoir wells using a 100 µl multi-channel pipette. Dispense 300 nL 3.4 mg/mL Sample to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Dispense 290 nL, Crystallisation screen to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Dispense 10 nL, Seeds to each lens using the SPT mosquito. Drop ratio: 30:29:1 ratio (300 nl Sample : 290 nl reservoir solution: 10 nl seeds) Final drop volume: 600 nl

Crystallisation screen composition: 0.1 Molarity (M) sodium citrate pH 5 14% w/v PEG 6000 Stock solutions used: 1 Molarity (M) sodium citrate adjusted to pH 5 with HCl 50% w/v PEG 6000 The crystallisation screen can be stored in a duran bottle or aliquoted into 96 deep well block for easy dispensing into SwissCI 3 lens plates. For long term storage keep the Crystallisation screen in the fridge at 4°C.

Crystal form after ~96 h. The crystals reach their maximum size after 96 h. Crystals typically form as single hexagonal crystals. Morphology: hexagonal. Size: ~100 μm in length and ~50 μm in width, depth of the crystals is ~10 μm Appearance : glass shard. Average resolution: 2.2 Å Space group: P6 3

Incubate at 20 °C for 24:00:00, h in Formulatrix Rock Imager. Imaging Schedule : The first images are taken after 12 h and the imaging schedule follows a Fibonacci sequence of days for further collections.

Formulatrix Rock Imager (or incubator of choice) SPT mosquito Mosquito HV (High Volume 16-Channel Robotic Liquid Handler, SPT LabTech, 3097-01057, https://www.sptlabtech.com/products/liquid-handling/mosquito-hv/ ) P100 8 multi-channel pipette SwissCI 3 lens plate
Prepare seed stock: Diamond XChem Seeding Protocol by Peter Marples No dilution Sample seeds

Diamond Light Source Unattended Data Collection (UDC) Data Collection Temperature: 100K Detector: DECTRIS EIGER2 X 9M Beamline: I04-1 Wavelength: 0.9127 Å Resolution (Å): 2.00 Beam Size (μm): 60 X 50 Number of images: 1500 Oscillation: 0.12° Exposure (s): 0.0400 Transmission (%): 100 Flux (ph/s): 93.50e+11
creator: Lizbé Koekemoer
